calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-19-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. (no case file)
Dept. 514, Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: Davis Realty Co. Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Jeffrey Bond was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Mary Lynn Trujillo
Co-Defendant William Marten defaulted, default entered 08-25-11.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 57 Taylor St., #448, San Francisco.
The lease is forfeited.
Back rent and Holdover Damages - $2,133.00
Costs - $315.00
Total - $2,448.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2011 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Off Calendar
